title: Hesperis spathulifolia
intro: Hesperis spathulifolia is a perennial plant species commonly known as Chinese bugloss or Chinese bugloss, belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The bioactive constituents of Hesperis spathulifolia include saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is also used in the production of capsules and other herbal supplements.
